creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
math/cloog fails to build with isl-0.13. It may be possible to fix using /deprecated/ headers which would render the bug invalid.

===>  Building for cloog-0.18.1_3
Making all in .
  CC     libcloog_isl_la-version.lo
  CC     libcloog_isl_la-domain.lo
source/isl/domain.c:514:3: warning: implicit declaration of function
      'isl_constraint_set_coefficient' is invalid in C99
      [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
                isl_constraint_set_coefficient(constraint, isl_dim_out, j,
                ^
source/isl/domain.c:521:2: warning: implicit declaration of function
      'isl_constraint_set_constant' is invalid in C99
      [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
        isl_constraint_set_constant(constraint, row[1 + nvariables + nparam]);
        ^
source/isl/domain.c:783:2: warning: implicit declaration of function
      'isl_set_dim_residue_class' is invalid in C99
      [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
        isl_set_dim_residue_class(set, strided_level - 1, stride, offset);
        ^
source/isl/domain.c:784:7: warning: implicit declaration of function
      'isl_int_is_zero' is invalid in C99 [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
        if (!isl_int_is_zero(*offset))
             ^
source/isl/domain.c:785:3: warning: implicit declaration of function 'isl_int_sub'
      is invalid in C99 [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
                isl_int_sub(*offset, *stride, *offset);
                ^
source/isl/domain.c:799:2: error: use of undeclared identifier 'isl_int'
        isl_int v;
        ^
source/isl/domain.c:807:2: warning: implicit declaration of function 'isl_int_init'
      is invalid in C99 [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
        isl_int_init(v);
        ^
source/isl/domain.c:807:15: error: use of undeclared identifier 'v'
        isl_int_init(v);
                     ^
source/isl/domain.c:808:2: warning: implicit declaration of function
      'isl_constraint_get_coefficient' is invalid in C99
      [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
        isl_constraint_get_coefficient(c, isl_dim_set, ccs->level - 1, &v);
        ^
source/isl/domain.c:808:66: error: use of undeclared identifier 'v'
        isl_constraint_get_coefficient(c, isl_dim_set, ccs->level - 1, &v);
                                                                        ^
source/isl/domain.c:809:6: warning: implicit declaration of function
      'isl_int_is_pos' is invalid in C99 [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
        if (isl_int_is_pos(v)) {
            ^
source/isl/domain.c:809:21: error: use of undeclared identifier 'v'
        if (isl_int_is_pos(v)) {
                           ^
source/isl/domain.c:812:55: error: use of undeclared identifier 'v'
                        isl_constraint_get_coefficient(c, isl_dim_div, i, &v);
                                                                           ^
source/isl/domain.c:813:25: error: use of undeclared identifier 'v'
                        if (!isl_int_is_zero(v))
                                             ^
source/isl/domain.c:819:2: warning: implicit declaration of function 'isl_int_clear'
      is invalid in C99 [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
        isl_int_clear(v);
        ^
source/isl/domain.c:819:16: error: use of undeclared identifier 'v'
        isl_int_clear(v);
                      ^
source/isl/domain.c:906:2: error: use of undeclared identifier 'isl_int'; did you
      mean 'isprint'?
        isl_int v;
        ^~~~~~~
        isprint
/usr/include/ctype.h:55:5: note: 'isprint' declared here
int     isprint(int);
        ^
source/isl/domain.c:906:9: error: expected ';' after expression
        isl_int v;
               ^
               ;
source/isl/domain.c:906:10: error: use of undeclared identifier 'v'
        isl_int v;
                ^
source/isl/domain.c:915:15: error: use of undeclared identifier 'v'
        isl_int_init(v);
                     ^
source/isl/domain.c:916:66: error: use of undeclared identifier 'v'
        isl_constraint_get_coefficient(c, isl_dim_set, csl->level - 1, &v);
                                                                        ^
source/isl/domain.c:917:22: error: use of undeclared identifier 'v'
        if (!isl_int_is_pos(v)) {
                            ^
source/isl/domain.c:918:17: error: use of undeclared identifier 'v'
                isl_int_clear(v);
                              ^
source/isl/domain.c:927:6: warning: implicit declaration of function
      'isl_aff_add_constant' is invalid in C99 [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
        b = isl_aff_add_constant(b, csl->stride->offset);
            ^
source/isl/domain.c:927:4: warning: incompatible integer to pointer conversion
      assigning to 'isl_aff *' (aka 'struct isl_aff *') from 'int'
      [-Wint-conversion]
        b = isl_aff_add_constant(b, csl->stride->offset);
          ^ ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
source/isl/domain.c:928:6: warning: implicit declaration of function
      'isl_aff_scale_down' is invalid in C99 [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
        b = isl_aff_scale_down(b, csl->stride->stride);
            ^
source/isl/domain.c:928:4: warning: incompatible integer to pointer conversion
      assigning to 'isl_aff *' (aka 'struct isl_aff *') from 'int'
      [-Wint-conversion]
        b = isl_aff_scale_down(b, csl->stride->stride);
          ^ ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
source/isl/domain.c:930:6: warning: implicit declaration of function 'isl_aff_scale'
      is invalid in C99 [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
        b = isl_aff_scale(b, csl->stride->stride);
            ^
source/isl/domain.c:930:4: warning: incompatible integer to pointer conversion
      assigning to 'isl_aff *' (aka 'struct isl_aff *') from 'int'
      [-Wint-conversion]
        b = isl_aff_scale(b, csl->stride->stride);
          ^ ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
source/isl/domain.c:931:2: warning: implicit declaration of function 'isl_int_neg'
      is invalid in C99 [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
        isl_int_neg(v, csl->stride->offset);
        ^
source/isl/domain.c:931:14: error: use of undeclared identifier 'v'
        isl_int_neg(v, csl->stride->offset);
                    ^
source/isl/domain.c:932:30: error: use of undeclared identifier 'v'
        b = isl_aff_add_constant(b, v);
                                    ^
source/isl/domain.c:939:16: error: use of undeclared identifier 'v'
        isl_int_clear(v);
                      ^
source/isl/domain.c:906:2: warning: expression result unused [-Wunused-value]
        isl_int v;
        ^~~~~~~
source/isl/domain.c:963:2: error: use of undeclared identifier 'isl_int'
        isl_int v;
        ^
source/isl/domain.c:973:15: error: use of undeclared identifier 'v'
        isl_int_init(v);
                     ^
fatal error: too many errors emitted, stopping now [-ferror-limit=]
17 warnings and 20 errors generated.
*** Error code 1
